PluginData.Author: lolifamily
PluginData.Tooltip: Install ONLY if your game crashes with IndexOutOfRangeException inside MyConcurrentTwoLevelQueue.
PluginData.Description:
Fixes one specific renderer crash by raising a hardcoded queue ceiling.
===== INSTALL ONLY IF ===== your game crashes to desktop AND the SpaceEngineers log contains BOTH of: 1) the exception System.IndexOutOfRangeException 2) a stack frame mentioning MyConcurrentTwoLevelQueue.Enqueue or MyUpdateFrame.Enqueue
Common triggers: - very large or densely built worlds - long sessions in busy scenes (many lights, particles, decals, LCDs) - mass-spawn / stress tests / heavy combat with lots of effects
===== WHAT IT DOES ===== VRage.Render hardcodes a per-frame render-message ceiling of 1024 x 1024 ~= 1.05M. Exceeding it throws inside the renderer and kills the game. This plugin rewrites the ceiling to 4096 x 1024 ~= 4.19M at load time via Mono.Cecil. Memory cost: ~24 KB. No API change, no gameplay change.
